subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

We would be happy to arrange an introductory call. The following slots are available on our end:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which works best for you, and we will send a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for internal contact information — I am unable to share direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering. All collaboration discussions should be coordinated through this channel to ensure the right stakeholders are involved at the appropriate stage.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
